project_type: Next.js 16 App Router with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS v4
build_system: npm with Next.js CLI (npx next build). Node v22 available via `source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh`.
test_framework: No test framework configured. Verification is via `npm run build` (production build) and `npm run lint`.
verification_instructions: 1. Run `npm run build` to verify production build succeeds. 2. Run `npm run lint` to verify no lint errors.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode - can install npm packages freely. Node v22 via nvm. No test framework installed. AGENTS.md warns that Next.js 16 may have breaking changes vs training data.
contribution_requirements: Use responsive Tailwind CSS utility classes. Ensure Semantic HTML for all layout sections.
key_patterns: Server actions in lib/actions.ts with 'use server' directive. In-memory Map-based store in lib/db.ts (data resets on cold start). All current operations hardcode user_id=1. Components in app/components/ use 'use client' with useTransition for form submissions. API routes use `export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic'`. Path alias @/* maps to project root.
directory_structure: app/ - Next.js App Router pages and API routes. app/components/ - Client components. lib/ - Shared utilities (db, types, actions, timezone). public/ - Static assets.
